sources.title: GM Online Order Guide
sources.model_scope: Current Chevrolet Car, Chevrolet Truck, and Chevrolet Electric order-guide entries.
sources.page_locator: PublicLogin, then api/Vehicles/ByBrand/{brand_id}/1/en-us and api/PullDown/GetColorAndTrim/{vehicle_id}/en-us.
limitations: The public API is mutable and requires a short-lived bearer token from api/sso/PublicLogin/.
The current public catalog returned model years 2025-2027 only; it did not expose 2008-2024.
This is an observed application API, not a published stability contract.
